narrative_seed_by_week.11: Python’s role — the orchestration layer that connects your specification to an AI system / Google Colab setup — no installation, runs in browser / Variables and data types — string, int, float, bool — with everyday analogies / If/else — making decisions in code, mirrors Week 1 flowcharts / For loops — doing something repeatedly / Spec-first discipline — describe what you want in plain English before asking AI to code / Golden rule — never run code you cannot explain line by line

lab_activity_seed_by_week.11: Script: student name + 3 marks → prints average and grade (A/B/C/F) / Step 1: write the spec. Step 2: ask Claude to implement. Step 3: explain every line. Step 4: test 3 edge cases / Journal Entry #6
